title: New Eva website at Yahoo
wikitext:
[]: New Eva website at Yahoo             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed May 30, 2012 11:23 am http://eva.yahoo.co.jp/ Details here: http://www.evageeks.org/2012/05/new-evangelion-website-at-yahoo/

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Wed May 30, 2012 12:39 pm Interesting! The current top-ranking TV episodes are: 1位： 第拾九話 男の戰い 2位： 第弐拾四話 最後のシ者 3位： 第六話 決戦、第3新東京市

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Wed May 30, 2012 12:57 pm Do I see something about an Eva theme park attraction? http://at-raku.com/ And theres also this directed by Anno: http://www.ntv.co.jp/tokusatsu/english.html Got to be something eva-related in there :)

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed May 30, 2012 1:08 pm The theme park isn't specifically Eva themed, the Tokyo Dome City has an English website as well but it doesn't mention anything about Eva or the cosplay event. They also had a Real Escape Game . As for the Nausicaa like giant, there's more detail about that here: http://forum.evageeks.org/post/538232/Hideaki-Anno-WANTED-To-Direct-a-Nausicaa-2/#538232 There's probably other bits of the site I missed, so far it looks pretty straightforward for an official Eva site. The "bringing the latest news about Q" might just be bait, dunno if they'll actually make the first announcement here.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed May 30, 2012 2:14 pm That Yahoo site was always there (or at least it was there for 2.0, since I had the thing bookmarked) but nice to see some new material up. Regarding the current rankings, all I can say is: Dem Kaworu and Rei fans. I guess people love Shinji (attempting) to kick butt in Episode 19 too. I hope this website is a sign we'll get some 3.0 news soon, but my guess is any official news will most likely come from the official Eva website ([url]http://evangelion.co.jp/[/url]) or the Tokyo Eva Store ([url]http://www.evastore.jp/real/index.html[/url]) first.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Wed May 30, 2012 7:42 pm I see the 3.0 date coming BTW, how comes episode 6 is above 22?

[]:             Quote Post by hb2 » Thu May 31, 2012 4:17 pm arael wrote: BTW, how comes episode 6 is above 22?

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Thu May 31, 2012 8:38 pm Ah... Duh for me...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu May 31, 2012 9:54 pm Poll results changed slightly, not too surprising with the voting fans can do: #1: Episode 19 #2: Episode 09 #3: Episode 06 I personally voted a few minutes ago, my choices were 09, 22, and 26. Though I love Prologue Arc Episode 04 as well.

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Thu May 31, 2012 10:20 pm Glad to see Zeruel is still everyone's favourite waifu.

[]:             Quote Post by bladerj » Fri Jun 01, 2012 6:10 pm Does anyone knows the font they use for the kanji in the description of characters ? i like that.

Article: New Eva website at Yahoo
 Dem Kaworu and Rei fans. I guess people love Shinji (attempting) to kick butt in Episode 19 too. I hope this website is a sign we'll get some 3.0 news soon, but my guess is any official news will most likely come from the official Eva website ([url]http://evangelion.co.jp/[/url]) or the Tokyo Eva Store ([url]http://www.evastore.jp/real/index.html[/url]) first.
